title: What Türkiye match will reveal about USMNT's knock...
summary: The USMNT will rotate its lineup for their Group D finale against Türkiye, a team that presents challenges comparable to the tournament's strongest competitors. This match will test the team's depth and tactical adaptability as they prepare for knockout stage football.
content: The USMNT is expected to rotate in its Group D finale against Türkiye, a side that will present a challenge similar to the World Cup's best teams.

zh.title: 土耳其比赛将如何揭示美国队的淘汰赛表现
zh.summary: 美国队将在D组最后一场比赛中轮换阵容对阵土耳其，这支球队实力堪比赛事最强对手。这场比赛将考验美国队的阵容深度和战术适应性，为淘汰赛做准备。

title: Aguirre's pragmatic Mexico has its doubters, but i...
summary: Mexico defeated Czechia 3-0 in a pragmatic performance that reflected head coach Javier Aguirre's tactical philosophy rather than dominant attacking football. Despite doubters questioning the team's style, the result represents a disciplined execution of Aguirre's strategic approach.
content: Don't let the 3-0 scoreline fool you -- Mexico's win over Czechia was as pragmatic as they come, which is just how head coach Javier Aguirre had planned it.

zh.title: 阿吉雷的务实墨西哥有怀疑者，但它已经奏效
zh.summary: 墨西哥以3-0战胜捷克，表现务实，体现了主教练阿吉雷的战术理念而非进攻足球。尽管有人质疑球队的风格，但这场胜利代表了对阿吉雷战术的有纪律执行。

title: Bologna open talks for Rangers' Raskin - gossip
summary: Bologna is initiating discussions with Rangers midfielder Raskin as Italian and English clubs express interest in the player. Additionally, a Scottish goalkeeper could be heading to a Premier League club.
content: Rangers midfielder attracts interest from Italy and England and Scotland goalkeeper could land move to Premier League giants...

zh.title: 博洛尼亚为流浪者队拉斯金启动转会谈判 - 传言
zh.summary: 博洛尼亚正在与流浪者队中场拉斯金进行谈判，意大利和英超球队都对这名球员感兴趣。此外，一名苏格兰门将可能即将加入英超球队。

title: Vini Jr. leads Brazil rout of Scotland to top grou...
summary: Vinícius Júnior led Brazil to a dominant 3-0 victory over Scotland, securing the top spot in Group C and putting Scotland's tournament hopes in jeopardy. The result demonstrated Brazil's attacking prowess under the star player's leadership.
content: Brazil secured the top spot in Group C as Vinícius Júnior inspired them to a 3-0 win over Scotland to leave the Tartan Army's hopes hanging by a thread.

zh.title: 维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔领导巴西大胜苏格兰登顶小组
zh.summary: 维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔率领巴西以3:0的绝对优势战胜苏格兰，确保了C组的头名位置，使苏格兰的锦标赛前景岌岌可危。这一结果展示了巴西在这位明星球员领导下的进攻实力。

title: S. Korea could exit WC after 'wrong' Son gamble
summary: South Korea coach Hong Myung-Bo made the controversial decision to bench captain Son Heung-Min for the first time since 2010 for a crucial Group A match against South Africa. The tactical gamble could determine whether South Korea advances from the group stage.
content: South Korea coach Hong Myung-Bo had jaws dropping when he chose to leave out captain Son Heung-Min from his first XI for Wednesday's Group A decider against South Africa -- the first time since 2010 Son had not started a World Cup game.

zh.title: 韩国在"失策"孙兴慜赌注后可能退出世界杯
zh.summary: 韩国教练洪明博做出了一个有争议的决定，在关键的A组与南非的比赛中首次自2010年以来将队长孙兴慜放在替补席上。这次战术赌注可能决定韩国是否能从小组阶段晋级。

title: Sources: Milan rejects NYCFC approach for Pulisic
summary: AC Milan has rejected NYCFC's attempt to acquire American forward Christian Pulisic, with the Italian club maintaining that the player is not available for transfer. The move signals Milan's commitment to retaining their U.S. international star.
content: AC Milan have rejected an approach by New York City FC for United States attacker Christian Pulisic, with Milan stating that the player isn't available, sources confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：米兰拒绝纽约城FC对普利西奇的示好
zh.summary: AC米兰已拒绝纽约城FC收购美国前锋克里斯蒂亚诺·普利西奇的尝试，这家意大利俱乐部坚持该球员不可交易。此举表明米兰致力于留住这位美国国脚明星。

title: Morocco see 'ingredients' to become WC winners
summary: Morocco coach Mohamed Ouahbi is motivating his players with ambitions to become the first African nation to win the World Cup. The coach emphasizes belief and confidence as essential ingredients for achieving this historic feat.
content: Morocco coach Mohamed Ouahbi has told his players they need to believe they can become the first African winners of the World Cup.

zh.title: 摩洛哥具备成为世界杯冠军的"要素"
zh.summary: 摩洛哥主教练穆罕默德·瓦赫比正在激励球员，雄心勃勃地成为第一个赢得世界杯的非洲国家。教练强调信念和自信是实现这一历史性壮举的必要要素。

title: Canada in WC knockouts, miss chance to top group
summary: Canada advanced to the World Cup knockout stage but missed the opportunity to top Group B after losing 2-1 to Switzerland. The defeat as co-hosts cost them the preferred seeding position in the round of 32.
content: Canada lost home advantage as World Cup co-hosts after a 2-1 defeat against Switzerland denied Jesse Marsch's team top spot in Group B.

zh.title: 加拿大进入世界杯淘汰赛，错失小组第一的机会
zh.summary: 加拿大晋级世界杯淘汰赛，但在以2-1不敌瑞士后错失B组第一的机会。作为共同东道主的这场失利让他们失去了更好的种子位置。

title: 🤔 Permutations: How teams qualify for knockouts
summary: This analysis explores the various scenarios and permutations that will determine which teams qualify for the knockout stage as the group phase concludes. It examines the pathways for advancement and identifies teams whose World Cup hopes remain in jeopardy.
content: Who can secure qualification before the group stage ends, and whose World Cup dreams could be shattered? Here's what you need to know.

zh.title: 🤔 排列组合：球队如何晋级淘汰赛
zh.summary: 本分析探讨了小组赛阶段结束时决定哪些球队晋级淘汰赛的各种情景和排列组合。它审视了推进的途径，并确定了世界杯希望仍然岌岌可危的球队。

title: Ochoa cameo seals perfect Mexico group stage
summary: Veteran goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa made a substitute appearance in Mexico's 3-0 victory over Czechia, marking his sixth World Cup appearance at age 40. The appearance exemplified Mexico's perfect group stage performance.
content: Goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa took the field during the 78th minute of Mexico's 3-0 win over Czechia, giving the 40-year-old the chance to appear in his sixth World Cup.

zh.title: 奥乔亚替补出场为墨西哥完美小组赛画上句号
zh.summary: 资深门将吉列尔莫·奥乔亚在墨西哥3:0战胜捷克的比赛中以替补身份出场,这是他40岁时的第六次世界杯亮相。这次出场体现了墨西哥完美的小组赛表现。

title: Aguirre cautious as Mexico cement historic WC run
summary: Mexico coach Javier Aguirre emphasizes a measured, incremental approach after his team completed their first-ever perfect group stage with a 3-0 win over Czechia. His cautious outlook reflects Mexico's focus on sustained performance through the knockout rounds.
content: Mexico coach Javier Aguirre urged his team to keep moving 'step by step' after a 3-0 victory over Czechia sealed El Tri's first-ever perfect World Cup group stage.

zh.title: 阿奎雷保持谨慎态度,墨西哥完成历史性的世界杯小组赛
zh.summary: 墨西哥主教练哈维尔·阿奎雷在球队以3:0战胜捷克完成历史首次完美小组赛后,强调了一种循序渐进、谨慎的态度。他的谨慎态度反映了墨西哥在淘汰赛阶段保持持续表现的重点。

title: Pochettino won't 'risk' USMNT players on yellows
summary: USMNT manager Mauricio Pochettino will rest four players with yellow card accumulation for Thursday's match against Türkiye to prevent suspension risk in the knockout stage. The tactical decision prioritizes squad availability for the elimination round on July 1.
content: United States manager Mauricio Pochettino said his four players on yellow cards won't start Thursday's match against Türkiye to avoid the possibility of being suspended for the round of 32 match on July 1.

zh.title: 波切蒂诺不会'冒险'让美国队球员面临黄牌风险
zh.summary: 美国队主教练毛里西奥·波切蒂诺将在周四对阵土耳其的比赛中轮休四名黄牌累积的球员,以防止淘汰赛阶段的停赛风险。这一战术决定优先确保球队在7月1日淘汰赛中的可用人员。

title: Neymar - the return of Brazil's forgotten hero
summary: BBC Sports correspondent Scott Mullen examines Neymar's return to prominence as Brazil's key player in their match against Scotland. The focus highlights the star's comeback and role in Brazil's tournament performance.
content: BBC Scotland's Scott Mullen delves into the return of Brazil's Neymar against Scotland.

zh.title: 内马尔 - 巴西被遗忘的英雄归来
zh.summary: BBC体育记者斯科特·穆伦分析了内马尔作为巴西对阵苏格兰比赛中关键球员的回归。重点突出了这位明星的复出及其在巴西锦标赛表现中的角色。

title: Best World Cup stadium? BBC Sport experts have their say
summary: BBC Sport experts share their perspectives on the best stadiums hosting the 2026 World Cup tournament. The commentary evaluates the venue experiences and facilities across the competition.
content: BBC Sport reporters have their say on the best stadium experiences at the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 最佳世界杯球场？BBC体育专家发表看法
zh.summary: BBC体育专家分享了他们对主办2026年世界杯锦标赛的最佳球场的看法。评论评估了整个比赛中的场地体验和设施。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 18
summary: This interactive feature challenges readers to identify a World Cup star through a guessing game format. Fans are invited to test their knowledge by identifying the player in the fewest attempts possible.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜测世界杯明星18号
zh.summary: 这个互动功能通过猜谜游戏格式挑战读者识别世界杯明星。邀请球迷通过最少次数的尝试来测试他们的知识。

title: Scotland hopes on the brink following defeat against Brazil
summary: Scotland's World Cup knockout ambitions are in serious jeopardy after losing 3-0 to Brazil in Group C, with defensive lapses proving costly. The defeat leaves Scotland's path to the last 32 uncertain heading into final group matches. Brazil finishes atop Group C as group winners.
content: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup for the first time are in significant peril with calamitous defending allowed Brazil to win 3-0 in Miami and finish top of Group C.

zh.title: 苏格兰在对巴西失利后希望岌岌可危
zh.summary: 苏格兰在C组对巴西的0-3失利后，世界杯淘汰赛的雄心受到严重威胁，防线漏洞导致失利代价高昂。这场失利使苏格兰前往32强的道路在进入小组赛最后阶段时变得不确定。巴西以小组第一的身份结束C组比赛。

title: Morocco progress after victory over Haiti
summary: Morocco advanced in the World Cup by defeating Haiti with late goals from Soufiane Rahimi and Gessime Yassine. The victory denied Haiti a historic first World Cup point and keeps Morocco's tournament hopes alive.
content: Soufiane Rahimi and Gessime Yassine score late goals for Morocco to deny Haiti their first-ever World Cup point in Atlanta.

zh.title: 摩洛哥击败海地后晋级
zh.summary: 摩洛哥通过击败海地而在世界杯中晋级，苏菲亚内·拉希米和格西梅·亚辛在比赛后期进球。这场胜利阻止了海地创造历史性的首个世界杯积分，并保持了摩洛哥的锦标赛希望。

title: Who was the pick of Scotland's players again?
summary: This article invites readers to rate players from the Scotland-Brazil World Cup match on a scale of 10, with final ratings to be revealed 30 minutes after the match concludes. The interactive feature allows fans to assess individual player performances from the contest.
content: Rate the Scotland and Brazil players out of 10 below and come back 30 minutes after full-time to see the final ratings.

zh.title: 苏格兰队员中的精选是谁？
zh.summary: 这篇文章邀请读者对苏格兰-巴西世界杯比赛中的球员进行1-10分的评分，最终评分将在比赛结束后30分钟公布。这个互动功能允许球迷评估比赛中各个球员的表现。
